modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble installing multifunction printer on personal Apple device

full_description_text: The user is trying to install a multifunction printer on their personal Apple device. They mentioned they are using a MacOS and iOS setup, but are unsure of the steps needed. There seems to be confusion about how to get the Papercut Print Deploy Client working properly.
short_description: Trouble installing multifunction printer on personal Apple device
description: The user is trying to install a multifunction printer on their personal Apple device. They mentioned they are using a MacOS and iOS setup, but are unsure of the steps needed. There seems to be confusion about how to get the Papercut Print Deploy Client working properly.
